form.formComment: Last start was driven from back in the field when 4th (Fr3) over 1780m at Mt Gambier, at the bell was 3rd-5.2 beaten 7 m by Dancin With Elvis (2:12.60) in NR up to 39 on April 7 at $2.30. Before that, 7th (Fr1) over 1680m at Terang, beaten 14 m by Huxham Chubb (2:05.80) in NR up to 45 on March 27 at $19. Capable of a lot more.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Hung in and locked wheels with Alook To Like near the 150m.
Inconvenienced near the 500m as Skinny Horace commenced to give ground.

form.formComment: Last start 4th (Fr2) over 1710m at Ballarat, at the bell was 2nd-1.78 beaten 7 m by Sir Candy Cloud (2:04.60) in NR up to 37 on April 9 at $4.60. At his previous start 4th (Fr4) over 1785m at Stawell, at the bell was 4th-10.6 beaten 14 m by Loan Sailor (2:11.30) in NR up to 40 on April 3 at $31. Leading contender.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Hung in shortly after the start.

form.formComment: Didn't do much last time out, 6th (Fr1) over 1780m at Mt Gambier, beaten 24 m by Dancin With Elvis (2:12.60) in NR up to 39 on April 7 at $61. Before that 8th (Fr1) over 1755m at Echuca beaten 35 m by Dot Ball (2:11.10) in NR up to 36 on March 10 at $81. Others make more appeal.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Didn't do much last time out, 6th (Fr1) over 1780m at Mt Gambier, beaten 24 m by Dancin With Elvis (2:12.60) in NR up to 39 on April 7 at $61. Before that 8th (Fr1) over 1755m at Echuca beaten 35 m by Dot Ball (2:11.10) in NR up to 36 on March 10 at $81. Others make more appeal.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Commenced to tire leaving the 800m mark to be beaten 75.6m.
Tired to be beaten 95m into last placing.

form.formComment: Comes here in the right form. Won by 2 m (Sr1) at Mt Gambier (2:12.60) beating El Awoman in NR up to 39 on April 7 at $71 at the bell was 5th-11.6. Two runs back was well back in the run when 9th (Fr4) over 1609m at Charlton beaten 24 m by Fair Chance (1:59.20) in NR up to 45 on September 29 at $126. Strong winning chance again.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Comes here in the right form. Won by 2 m (Sr1) at Mt Gambier (2:12.60) beating El Awoman in NR up to 39 on April 7 at $71 at the bell was 5th-11.6. previousStarts.stewardsComment: Failed to be in position at the start.
Checked near the 600m when Rolling Remona began to tire.

form.formComment: Showed a glimmer of form last start was well back in the run when 2nd (Fr5) over 1780m at Mt Gambier, at the bell was 4th-7.2 beaten 2 m by Dancin With Elvis (2:12.60) in NR up to 39 on April 7 at $81. But The run before was well beaten into seventh after being driven well back, behind Smokin Strepo at Mt Gambier over 1780m in a NR up to 39 on February 17 at $151. Facing a tough assignment this time around.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Utilised the sprint lane in the home straight.

form.formComment: Last start was driven from back in the field when 6th (Fr7) over 1785m at Stawell was 7th-15.4 at the bell, beaten 19 m by Loan Sailor (2:11.30) in NR up to 40 on April 3 at $8. At the start before solid effort despite getting well back, when 3rd (Fr7) over 1790m at Ararat was 5th-7.7 at the bell, beaten 13 m by Sea Hunter (2:12.40) in NR up to 38 on March 23 at $19. Will be about the money.

form.formComment: Last start 5th (Fr4) over 1780m after showing early pace at Mt Gambier was leading by 1.6 at the bell, beaten 9 m by Dancin With Elvis (2:12.60) in NR up to 39 on April 7 at $2.40. At her previous start surrendered the lead and finished 10th (Fr1) over 1680m after showing early speed at Terang beaten 24 m by Admiralofthefleet (2:02.50) in NR up to 47 on March 27 at $81. Better than that and deserves another chance.

form.formComment: Capable of better than we have seen lately. Last start 10th (Sr3) over 1790m at Mildura, at the bell was 6th-8.6 beaten 18 m by Rocking Wroxton (2:14.80) in NR up to 39 on April 7 at $2.80. The start before 5th (Fr3) over 1680m after showing early pace at Terang beaten 8 m by Huxham Chubb (2:05.80) in NR up to 45 on March 27 at $3.80. No surprise if he turned things around.

form.formComment: Last start 11th (Fr2) over 1785m after showing early speed at Stawell was 7th-8.1 at the bell, beaten 12 m by Optimal (2:11.30) in 4yo+ NR up to 49 on April 3 at $9.50. Before that, a game effort when 2nd (Sr2) over 1790m at Ararat was 2nd-3 at the bell, beaten 1.2 m by Sea Hunter (2:12.40) in NR up to 38 on March 23 at $2.80. Sure to play a major role.
